name: Dandy's world pick me problems (3)
description:
it was just a normal day at cared view nothing much but then... The doors got open and a new toon was standing there it was a tulip her name was candy her petals were light-purple and her dress was white she had a pink bow

Brightney: hm! A new toon! Looey: I hope they like my circus acts! Sprout/Cosmo: I hope our sweets won't be too sweet for them! Dandy: Oh golly! A new toon! Astro: hi... Vee: hm... I don't really like their looks... Shelly: Vee be nice! Pepple: arf! Arf! Connie: boo... Hah... Yatta: OMG! This is SO COOL! Bobette: wow! Ginger: hm... Coal: bworf! Rudie: hehehe... Christmas.... Finn: this is finn-tastic! Maybe they like my facts! Glisten: no way! We all know I'm the fabuloust here! Flutter: ....! Gigi: more items to steal!!!! Razzle:a new comedic friend! Dazzle: I hope they aren't a pick me.... Shrimpo: GO BACK WHERE YOU CAME FROM NEW TOON! I HATE NEW TOONS! Toodles: ohhh! A new toon to play whit! Rodger: I guess so but hopefully they'll answer my mystery questions Teagen: yeah. I guess so. I'll ask if they wanna be invited to my tea party. Bassie: ... Am I gonna be replaced?.. Cocoa: No way! You'll still be the bassie I know! Flyte: wait... Something is wrong here... Blot: ... haeY Dyle: ... Yeah Flytes quite right something isn't good about this girl...

Candy: ugh... I wish only boys would be here.... (Sorry if I forgot one :< add the ones I forgot please and enjoy my flowers<3)

(Edit: Y'ALL GOTTA CHILL OMGGG GUYS SRRY FOR NOT REACTING I LUV YOU GUYSSSESSS!!!! <3 Y'ALL BLEW THIS UP I'M SO GRATEFUL Y'ALL SRRY FOR NOT RESPONDING SOONER I HAD WORK!... anti school team >:( ANYWAYS IM SO GRATEFUL OMGGG)

((Edit 2: added some missing toons for y'all! Ik it got a little boring because of no changes but I took care of it! And btw I changed Dandys dialogue so like what he is saying to a more uhm... Happy dialogue-))
creator: Angele_Nightstar
